arguments.file_text:
# HelpChatbot — RAG-Powered Product Documentation Chatbot

## Problem

Build a web-based chatbot that lets customers ask questions about internal product documentation (PDFs stored in a local folder). The chatbot uses an LLM with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to ground answers in the actual documentation.

## Technology Decisions

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| **Framework** | Blazor Server (.NET 10) | Interactive server-side rendering; real-time chat via SignalR; no need for WASM complexity |
| **LLM Abstraction** | Microsoft.Extensions.AI (`IChatClient`, `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; DI-friendly; supports streaming |
| **LLM Provider** | OpenAI via `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` | Swappable later; user provides API key via config |
| **Vector Storage** | PostgreSQL + pgvector via EF Core + `Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore` | Single database for both relational and vector data; avoids a separate vector DB |
| **PDF Parsing** | `PdfPig` (UglyToad.PdfPig) | Pure .NET, no native deps, well-maintained |
| **ORM** | EF Core + Npgsql | Standard .NET data access for Postgres |
| **Orchestration** | None (MEAI `IChatClient` directly) | Single prompt→response with RAG context; no tool calling or agentic loops needed |

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  Blazor Server UI               │
│              (Chat.razor component)             │
└──────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                   │
         ┌─────────▼──────────┐
         │    ChatService      │  ← orchestrates RAG flow
         │  (retrieve → prompt │
         │     → stream LLM)  │
         └──┬─────────────┬───┘
            │             │
   ┌────────▼───┐   ┌────▼──────────┐
   │ Retrieval  │   │  IChatClient  │
   │  Service   │   │  (MEAI/OpenAI)│
   └────┬───────┘   └───────────────┘
        │
   ┌────▼──────────────────┐
   │  PostgreSQL + pgvector │
   │  ┌──────────────────┐ │
   │  │ document_chunks   │ │  ← embeddings + text
   │  │ chat_sessions     │ │  ← conversation history
   │  │ chat_messages     │ │
   │  └──────────────────┘ │
   └───────────────────────┘

   ┌─────────────────────────┐
   │  DocumentIngestionService│  ← startup/on-demand
   │  PDF → chunk → embed    │
   │  → upsert to pgvector   │
   └─────────────────────────┘
```

## Data Model

### DocumentChunk
- `Id` (Guid, PK)
- `DocumentName` (string) — source PDF filename
- `ChunkIndex` (int) — ordering within document
- `Content` (string) — chunk text
- `Embedding` (Vector) — pgvector embedding

### ChatSession
- `Id` (Guid, PK)
- `Title` (string, nullable) — auto-generated from first message
- `CreatedAt` (DateTime)

### ChatMessage
- `Id` (Guid, PK)
- `SessionId` (Guid, FK → ChatSession)
- `Role` (string) — "user" | "assistant"
- `Content` (string)

# HelpChatbot — RAG-Powered Product Documentation Chatbot

## Problem

Build a web-based chatbot that lets customers ask questions about internal product documentation (PDFs stored in a local folder). The chatbot uses an LLM with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to ground answers in the actual documentation.

## Technology Decisions

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| **Framework** | Blazor Server (.NET 10) | Interactive server-side rendering; real-time chat via SignalR; no need for WASM complexity |
| **LLM Abstraction** | Microsoft.Extensions.AI (`IChatClient`, `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; DI-friendly; supports streaming |
| **LLM Provider** | OpenAI via `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` | Swappable later; user provides API key via config |
| **Vector Storage** | PostgreSQL + pgvector via EF Core + `Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore` | Single database for both relational and vector data; avoids a separate vector DB |
| **PDF Parsing** | `PdfPig` (UglyToad.PdfPig) | Pure .NET, no native deps, well-maintained |
| **ORM** | EF Core + Npgsql | Standard .NET data access for Postgres |
| **Orchestration** | None (MEAI `IChatClient` directly) | Single prompt→response with RAG context; no tool calling or agentic loops needed |

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  Blazor Server UI               │
│              (Chat.razor component)             │
└──────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                   │
         ┌─────────▼──────────┐
         │    ChatService      │  ← orchestrates RAG flow
         │  (retrieve → prompt │
         │     → stream LLM)  │
         └──┬─────────────┬───┘
            │             │
   ┌────────▼───┐   ┌────▼──────────┐
   │ Retrieval  │   │  IChatClient  │
   │  Service   │   │  (MEAI/OpenAI)│
   └────┬───────┘   └───────────────┘
        │
   ┌────▼──────────────────┐
   │  PostgreSQL + pgvector │
   │  ┌──────────────────┐ │

- Uses PdfPig to extract text per page

# HelpChatbot — RAG-Powered Product Documentation Chatbot

## Problem

Build a web-based chatbot that lets customers ask questions about internal product documentation (PDFs stored in a local folder). The chatbot uses an LLM with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to ground answers in the actual documentation.

## Technology Decisions

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| **Framework** | Blazor Server (.NET 10) | Interactive server-side rendering; real-time chat via SignalR; no WASM complexity |
| **LLM Abstraction** | Microsoft.Extensions.AI (`IChatClient`, `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; DI-friendly; supports streaming |
| **LLM Provider** | OpenAI via `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` | Swappable later; user provides API key via config |
| **Vector Storage** | PostgreSQL + pgvector via EF Core + `Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore` | Single DB for relational + vector data |
| **PDF Parsing** | `PdfPig` (UglyToad.PdfPig) | Pure .NET, no native deps |
| **ORM** | EF Core + Npgsql | Standard .NET data access for Postgres |
| **Orchestration** | None (MEAI `IChatClient` directly) | Single prompt→response with RAG context; no tool calling needed |

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  Blazor Server UI               │
│              (Chat.razor component)             │
└──────────────────┬──────────────────────────────┘
                   │
         ┌─────────▼──────────┐
         │    ChatService      │  ← orchestrates RAG flow
         │  (retrieve → prompt │
         │     → stream LLM)  │
         └──┬─────────────┬───┘
            │             │
   ┌────────▼───┐   ┌────▼──────────┐
   │ Retrieval  │   │  IChatClient  │
   │  Service   │   │  (MEAI/OpenAI)│
   └────┬───────┘   └───────────────┘
        │
   ┌────▼──────────────────┐
   │  PostgreSQL + pgvector │
   │  ┌──────────────────┐ │
   │  │ document_chunks   │ │  ← embeddings + text
   │  │ chat_sessions     │ │  ← conversation history
   │  │ chat_messages     │ │
   │  └──────────────────┘ │
   └───────────────────────┘

   ┌─────────────────────────┐
   │ DocumentIngestionService │  ← startup / on-demand
   │  PDF → chunk → embed    │
   │  → upsert to pgvector   │
   └─────────────────────────┘
```

### DocumentChunk
- `Id` (Guid, PK)
- `DocumentName` (string) — source PDF filename
- `ChunkIndex` (int) — ordering within document
- `Content` (string) — chunk text
- `Embedding` (Vector) — pgvector embedding

### ChatSession
- `Id` (Guid, PK)
- `Title` (string, nullable) — auto-generated from first message
- `CreatedAt` (DateTime)

### ChatMessage
- `Id` (Guid, PK)
- `SessionId` (Guid, FK → ChatSession)
- `Role` (string) — "user" | "assistant"
- `Content` (string)
- `CreatedAt` (DateTime)

```xml
<!-- AI -->
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI" Version="10.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI" Version="10.*" />

<!-- Data -->
<PackageReference Include="Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL" Version="10.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Pgvector" Version="0.3.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore" Version="0.3.*" />
<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design" Version="10.*" />

<!-- PDF -->
<PackageReference Include="PdfPig" Version="0.1.*" />
```

- Returns top-K chunks with relevance scores
- Applies minimum similarity threshold (0.75)

- Retrieves relevant chunks for the user query
- Builds a system prompt with RAG context and source attribution
- Calls `IChatClient` with streaming (`GetStreamingResponseAsync`)

+# HelpChatbot — RAG-Powered Product Documentation Chatbot

+## Problem

+
+## Technology Decisions
+
+| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
+|---------|--------|-----------|
+| **Framework** | Blazor Server (.NET 10) | Interactive server-side rendering; real-time chat via SignalR; no WASM complexity |
+| **LLM Abstraction** | Microsoft.Extensions.AI (`IChatClient`, `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; DI-friendly; supports streaming |
+| **LLM Provider** | OpenAI via `Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenAI` | Swappable later; user provides API key via config |
+| **Vector Storage** | PostgreSQL + pgvector via EF Core + `Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore` | Single DB for relational + vector data |
+| **PDF Parsing** | `PdfPig` (UglyToad.PdfPig) | Pure .NET, no native deps |
+| **ORM** | EF Core + Npgsql | Standard .NET data access for Postgres |
+| **Orchestration** | None (MEAI `IChatClient` directly) | Single prompt→response with RAG context; no tool calling needed |
+

+
